commit.message:
Add host_wake_all_slots to pre-warm shadow FX before Song Mode playback

With Link Audio, Move's native track audio routes through shadow slots
for FX processing. When a track goes quiet, the slot idles and skips
rendering. On step transitions, the sudden audio arrival caused glitches
because FX state was stale. Wake all slots at playback start and each
step advance so FX chains run on zeros before audio arrives.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(docker): strip CRLF de start-dev.sh en el entrypoint

El volumen de docker-compose sobrescribía el start-dev.sh arreglado por
dos2unix en el Dockerfile con la versión CRLF del host Windows, causando
que bash lo interpretara como sh y fallara con "pipefail: invalid option".

Se agrega un entrypoint que ejecuta sed antes de correr el script,
garantizando endings LF sin importar el estado del archivo en el host.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: use onAuthStateChange in AuthGuard to prevent tab-switch hangs

Supabase JS v2 uses navigator.locks for session management. When
returning from a background tab, getSession() can block on the lock
while a token refresh is in progress, causing permanent loading
spinners.

- Rewrite AuthGuard to use onAuthStateChange (fires INITIAL_SESSION
  immediately, then TOKEN_REFRESHED after tab return — never blocks
  on the lock)
- Consolidate Google refresh token capture into the same listener
- Keep isAuthenticated() try-catch as safety net for other callers
- Revert Supabase client to default config (keep navigator.locks
  for multi-tab token refresh safety)
- Hook cleanup: clear recombine timer without firing async calls

commit.message:
Fix blank-page-on-refresh by adding SPA fallback at every layer

Previously, hitting the Express server directly on a non-API path
(e.g. localhost:5000/login) returned a JSON 404 — causing a blank
page with "Route not found." instead of the React app.

Changes:
- server/src/app.ts: Replace the JSON 404 catch-all with a smart
  handler that 302-redirects non-API browser requests to CLIENT_URL
  (the React SPA), while still returning JSON 404 for unknown /api/*
  routes. This mirrors the behaviour of the nginx and Render configs.
- client/public/_redirects: Add Netlify/Render-format SPA fallback
  (/* /index.html 200) as belt-and-suspenders alongside the existing
  render.yaml routes rewrite rule.

commit.message:
Live event ticker and activity panel — real time stream visibility

- Progress strip: live event count with pulsing green dot, seconds since last event
- Stall detection: amber warning at 10s silence, red "stream dead" at 30s
- Collapsible activity panel below progress bar with scrolling event log
- Event entries show: type badge (color-coded), model, round, score, timestamp
- Max 100 entries, newest at top, clear button

party was displaying as a "?" badge on the site instead of "I".

fix: use useEffect for deep-link redirect when already logged in

stytch.session.getTokens() returns null during the initial render
because the SDK hasn't hydrated tokens from cookies yet. Move the
deep-link logic to a useEffect with a retry after 800ms.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: WE launch data quality — Show-Score URL blocker, scoring priority fix, outlet registry cleanup

Phase 1: Data quality gates in rebuild pipeline
- Block reviews with show-score.com URLs from ShowScore sources (aggregator pages, not reviews)
- Warn on WE reviews from known off-WE venues (menier, donmar, etc.)

Phase 2: Fix ShowScore star-rating vs LLM score priority
- Move downgraded ShowScore originalScore (P4b) to P3b, before low-conf LLM fallback (P4)
- Star ratings (3/5, 4/5) now correctly score ~60, ~80 instead of being overridden by
  low-confidence LLM scores of 25-50. Affects 34 WE reviews.

Phase 3: Outlet registry cleanup
- Remove duplicate `i-newspaper` canonical entry (was T3, conflicts with `i-paper` T2)
- Add `i-newspaper` to _aliasIndex pointing to `i-paper`

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: propagate API errors through all-vehicles batch endpoint

When all route chunks return API errors (e.g. rate limit), the batch
/vehicles endpoint was swallowing errors and returning an empty vehicle
array. Now detects when all chunks errored and returns the actual error
message so the frontend can show the rate limit banner.

Add maj7 chord support and fix slash chord modifier placement

commit.message:
Replace pandoc EPUB generation with Go-native archive/zip implementation

Pandoc startup overhead was causing the Cloudflare Pages build to exceed
the 20-minute free-tier timeout. The new renderEPUB writes a valid EPUB3
ZIP (mimetype, META-INF/container.xml, OEBPS/{content,nav}.xhtml,
OEBPS/content.opf) directly using Go's archive/zip — no external tools.
